description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on every push to the main branch and on pull requests. The workflow has a concurrency group that cancels in-progress jobs. It consists of multiple jobs: ruff, tests_matrix, docs, build, and tests. The ruff job checks code with the ruff action. The tests_matrix job runs tests across a matrix of Python and Django versions, installing dependencies and running tests. The docs and build jobs build documentation and a package, respectively. The tests job aggregates results from previous jobs.
